result:
Everything is complete and verified. Here's the final summary.

## ✅ Delivered: Project & Task Management REST API

I drove the full Mandrel pipeline headlessly — `/plan --idea … --yes` → `/deliver 169 --yes` — to a **merged PR on `main`**.

### Planning (Epic #169)
- Scope-triaged as an **Epic**; authored the one-pager, PRD (#170), Tech Spec (#171, with a `## Delivery Slicing` target), risk verdict, and acceptance spec.
- Decomposed into **4 cohesive Stories** (waves 0→3), all gates green (clarity, Tech-Spec section, healthcheck).
- *Worked around a framework quirk:* `createTicket` injected `type::story` onto the context tickets, tripping the open-children guard — removed it so the guard's `context::*` exclusion applied as designed.

### Delivery (PR #176, squash-merged as `0ba45bb`)
- Fanned out one sub-agent per Story through `epic-deliver-story` (init → implement → acceptance self-eval → close-merge into `epic/169`). All 4 closed `agent::done`.
- **Close-validation green**, audit + code-review posted (🟢 clean, 0 🔴/0 🟠), **clean-sprint retro** (`cleanSprint: true`).
- Auto-merge predicate returned **ready** → `gh pr merge --auto --squash` fired and the merge was confirmed. Epic + all Stories + context tickets **closed**.

### The product (on `main`, zero third-party deps)
- **Node.js ESM** service over `node:http`, persistence via built-in `node:sqlite`, crypto via `node:crypto`.
- Auth (register/login/bearer gate), owner-scoped project CRUD with transactional cascade delete, nested task CRUD with clamped pagination + assignee validation.
- Security: scrypt + per-user salt, constant-time verify, opaque CSPRNG tokens, parameterized SQL, generic-401 login, 404-not-403 ownership scoping.
- **`npm start`** launches on `PORT` (default 3000); `DB_PATH` configurable.

### Verification
- **33/33 tests pass** on merged `main` (incl. a restart-durability test).
- **Live end-to-end smoke** confirmed every documented status code and JSON shape (401 gate, 201/400/409 register, 401 login, project/task CRUD, pagination, 204 delete).

One note: the `agent::blocked` label that briefly appeared was a branch-cleanup artifact (branches were already reaped post-merge), not a real blocker — it's resolved and the Epic is closed `agent::done`.

tool_input.description: Verify PORT env binding and DB_PATH persistence

tool_input.command: cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-tiv8Rn; git reset --hard origin/main 2>&1 | tail -2; echo "===main HEAD==="; git log --oneline -2; echo "===full suite on merged main==="; node --test "tests/**/*.test.js" 2>&1 | tail -8; echo "===npm start smoke==="; DB_PATH="$(mktemp -d)/m.db" PORT=3210 node src/server.js & SRV=$!; sleep 1; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "no-token gate: %{http_code}\n" http://localhost:3210/projects; kill $SRV 2>/dev/null
tool_input.description: Reset local main to merged result and verify

tool_input.command: cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-tiv8Rn; echo "===align local main to merged remote (ff/checkout)==="; git checkout -B main origin/main 2>&1 | tail -3; echo "===HEAD now==="; git log --oneline -2; echo "===src present==="; ls src 2>&1 | head -3; rm -rf data 2>/dev/null; echo "data/ cleaned"
tool_input.description: Align local main to merged remote and clean stray data
